title: Somewhere Outside of Eden
overview: In a seemingly utopian future, the Black Hole gang and its leader investigate a series of disappearances. Meanwhile, a mysterious young girl confronts a kidnapper in a back alley, and things don’t go according to plan.

title: General Lin's Alias Si Ge
overview: The Eden System may be facing competition. Si Ge asks Headmaster Lu to find out more, and entrusts Zhan Lu with a secret mission.

title: The Starry Sky Above Us
overview: Zhan Lu begins to experience errors. Lu Bixing’s school runs into trouble, but he receives encouragement from unexpected quarters. Meanwhile, there’s more to the League Secretary’s wife than meets the eye.

title: Making God or Going to Hell
overview: Neither the Starsea students nor their headmaster can resist trying out new technology. Meanwhile, Si Ge attends a gangster meet-up and finds out what Venom Nest has really been up to.

title: Si Ge and His Duplicate
overview: The Starsea students are trapped in the Venom Nest base. Headmaster Lu tries to rescue them - but he’s still in disguise. Si Ge is confronted with the ghosts of his past.

title: In His Genes
overview: Headmaster Lu protects his wayward students while Si Ge and One-Eyed Hawk deal with Venom Nest. Some unexpected relationships are revealed.

title: Farewell, North Tower Planet
overview: A new enemy appears on the scene, putting Si Ge and company - and their entire planet - in grave danger.

title: Being Homeless and Brainless
overview: Si Ge, Lu Bixing, and their companions regroup at an old supply station as they come to terms with the loss of their home and prepare their next move.

title: A Narrow Escape
overview: The group has to face down yet another attack. As their supplies dwindle, they reflect on the state of the League, and Si Ge wonders who’s really backing Prince Kelet.

title: Si Ge and One-Eyed Hawk
overview: Si Ge presses 001 for information about the war on the League. The group fends off another mecha attack and learn more about who their enemies might be.

title: Desert
overview: One-Eyed Hawk tells his son about Si Ge’s past. Faced with the threat of another, more powerful shockwave, the group seeks help from some unlikely allies.

title: Empty-Brain Syndrome
overview: While Si Ge pursues a dangerous course among the asteroids, Lu Bixing and his students work on mecha control.

title: Inhuman
overview: As Lu and his students struggle to control the group’s mechas, Si Ge hatches a plan to draw their enemies away, using himself as a decoy.

title: Ten-Second Countdown
overview: While Si Ge explores Inhuman’s ship and uncovers a dark secret, Lu and his students prepare for their moment of reckoning.

title: Surprise
overview: Inhuman tracks Si Ge to the hidden warp point. While they prepare for a showdown, Lu decides to take matters into his own hands and search for his friend.

title: Yesterday Once More
overview: Lu Bixing continues his desperate search for Si Ge, while Si Ge deals with Inhuman once and for all. In another galaxy, Lin Jingshu reveals her plans for Eden.
